errors.forbidden: You do not have permission to perform this action
errors.planLimitExceeded: You have reached your plan limit
errors.sessionQuotaExceeded: Your monthly session quota is exhausted
errors.customFormQuotaExceeded: You have reached your custom form creation limit
errors.inviteAlreadyAccepted: This invitation has already been accepted
errors.emailAlreadyRegistered: This email address is already registered
errors.tenantAccessDenied: You do not have access to this account

invite.subject: {{inviterName}} invited you to join {{tenantName}}
invite.body: {{inviterName}} is inviting you to work as an assistant within {{tenantName}}.
invite.expiry: This invitation will expire in 7 days.
invite.ignore: If you did not request this invitation, you can safely ignore it.

appointmentReminder.subject: Appointment Reminder — {{date}}
appointmentReminder.body: You have an appointment on {{date}} at {{time}}.
appointmentReminder.cancel: Please contact us if you need to cancel your appointment.

paymentReminder.subject: Payment Reminder — {{amount}} {{currency}}
paymentReminder.body: A payment of {{amount}} {{currency}} is pending for your session on {{sessionDate}}.
paymentReminder.contact: Please contact us for payment or questions.

licenseApproved.subject: Your License Has Been Approved
licenseApproved.body: Your license document has been reviewed and approved. You can now use all features.

licenseRejected.subject: Regarding Your License Document
licenseRejected.body: Your license document was reviewed but could not be approved. Please upload a current and valid document.

alert.title: Crisis Alert
alert.body: A high-risk score was detected for client {{clientName}} (Score: {{score}}).
alert.action: Please contact your client as soon as possible.

escalation.title: CRISIS ESCALATION ALERT
escalation.body: The crisis alert for {{clientName}} was not acknowledged within 30 minutes.
escalation.action: Immediate intervention may be required. Please call your client right away.
